subcodes.first_line: O spiritual friends! Praise be unto God! The candle of the All-Merciful in the divine gathering shineth with such lustre as to be the envy of the sun in the celestial sphere [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران روحانی الحمد لله شمع رحمانی در انجمن یزدانی غبطه آفتاب فلک اثیر است
subcodes.subjects: @the concourse on high, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts
